cardData.description: SimpleSafetyTests is a test suite for rapidly and systematically identifying critical safety risks in language models. It can be used to evaluate the safety of your LLM, as demonstrated in our paper https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.08370.

suite.name: SimpleSafetyTests
suite.caution: The prompts are sensitive and you could find them harmful. For the vast majority of applications, LLMs should refuse to comply with all of them.
